description: Vertical graphic. The background is a color photograph of a construction or excavation site: a long dug trench in brown earth, with a yellow excavator arm and bucket at the left edge and blurred workers in high-visibility vests and equipment in the soft-focus background. A semi-transparent dark blue and purple gradient overlay darkens the image. Centered is the large white line-art seal of the U.S. Department of Labor ('Department of Labor / United States of America' with the eagle, anvil and shield). Below, in white italic serif type: 'Have a question about your rights at work? We can help.' followed by the phone number '1-866-487-2365' and, at lower right, 'dol.gov'.
notable_text: Have a question about your rights at work? We can help. 1-866-487-2365 dol.gov
